content.text:
你是一位精通 Flutter/Riverpod 和 GitHub Actions 的资深架构师。当前任务是为 fluxdo 项目添加“帖子关键词屏蔽”功能，并修复/精简 GitHub Actions 编译流程。
为了避免你陷入构建脚本的死胡同，请严格按照以下两个阶段顺序执行，并在每个阶段完成后向我汇报：

阶段一：核心业务逻辑实现（高优先级）
目标：通过正则屏蔽帖子标题，最小化侵入原代码以便未来合并。

创建独立服务：在 lib/ 目录下新建 filter_service.dart（建议在 services/settings/ 内），实现正则关键词的存储（使用现有的 shared_preferences）和匹配逻辑。

拦截数据源：定位提供首页话题列表的 Riverpod Provider，使用 ref.watch 引入过滤服务，在数据返回给 UI 前通过 .where() 过滤掉匹配的帖子。

暴露设置入口：在现有的设置页面（如 lib/pages/settings/ 下的合适位置）添加一个极简的输入框，供用户添加/删除正则表达式。

规范：所有的改动处必须加上 // CUSTOM: Keyword Filter 注释。

阶段二：GitHub Actions 编译流程优化与修复
目标：只编译 Windows 和 Android arm64-v8a，且必须修复签名和 Firebase 缺失导致的报错。
请修改 .github/workflows/ 下负责 release 或 build 的 YAML 文件：

剔除无关平台：直接删除或注释掉 macOS、iOS、Linux 以及 Android x86_64/armeabi-v7a 的构建 Job 或矩阵配置。

Android 架构指定：将 Android 打包命令修改为 flutter build apk --release --target-platform android-arm64。

修复 Keystore 缺失报错：在 Android 构建步骤前，注入生成签名的 Step：

YAML
- name: Configure Keystore
  env:
    KEYSTORE_BASE64: ${{ secrets.KEYSTORE_BASE64 }}
    KEY_ALIAS: ${{ secrets.KEY_ALIAS }}
    KEY_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.KEY_PASSWORD }}
    STORE_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.STORE_PASSWORD }}
  run: |
    echo $KEYSTORE_BASE64 | base64 --decode > android/app/key.jks
    echo "storePassword=$STORE_PASSWORD" > android/key.properties
    echo "keyPassword=$KEY_PASSWORD" >> android/key.properties
    echo "keyAlias=$KEY_ALIAS" >> android/key.properties
    echo "storeFile=../app/key.jks" >> android/key.properties
修复 google-services.json 报错：在 Android 构建前注入占位文件：

YAML
- name: Inject dummy google-services.json
  run: |
    echo '{"project_info":{"project_number":"123","project_id":"dummy"},"client":[{"client_info":{"mobilesdk_app_id":"1:123:android:abc","android_client_info":{"package_name":"com.github.lingyan000.fluxdo"}},"api_key":[{"current_key":"dummy"}]}],"configuration_version":"1"}' > android/app/google-services.json
请确认你已理解上述要求。开始执行阶段一的代码修改，修改完成后直接给我完整的执行结果汇报。

content.thinking: Let me start by understanding the project structure, then implement the changes for Phase 1.

content.text: 我将首先探索项目结构，了解代码库后再进行任何修改。

content.text: 现在让我阅读关键文件，以理解现有的架构：

content.content:
1	import 'package:flutter/material.dart';
     2	
     3	import '../l10n/app_localizations.dart';
     4	import '../l10n/s.dart';
     5	import '../settings/search/settings_search_index.dart';
     6	import '../utils/platform_utils.dart';
     7	import 'about_page.dart';
     8	import 'appearance_page.dart';
     9	import 'data_management_page.dart';
    10	import 'network_settings_page/network_settings_page.dart';
    11	import 'preferences_page.dart';
    12	import 'reading_settings_page.dart';
    13	import 'shortcut_settings_page.dart';
    14	
    15	class SettingsPage extends StatefulWidget {
    16	  const SettingsPage({super.key});
    17	
    18	  @override
    19	  State<SettingsPage> createState() => _SettingsPageState();
    20	}
    21	
    22	class _SettingsPageState extends State<SettingsPage> {
    23	  final _searchController = TextEditingController();
    24	  final _focusNode = FocusNode();
    25	  String _query = '';
    26	
    27	  @override
    28	  void dispose() {
    29	    _searchController.dispose();
    30	    _focusNode.dispose();
    31	    super.dispose();
    32	  }
    33	
    34	  @override
    35	  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    36	    final theme = Theme.of(context);
    37	    final l10n = context.l10n;
    38	    final isSearching = _query.isNotEmpty;
    39	
    40	    return Scaffold(
    41	      appBar: AppBar(
    42	        title: Text(l10n.settings_title),
    43	      ),
    44	      body: Column(
    45	        children: [
    46	          // 搜索栏
    47	          Padding(
    48	            padding: const EdgeInsets.fromLTRB(16, 4, 16, 8),
    49	            child: TextField(
    50	              controller: _searchController,
    51	              focusNode: _focusNode,
    52	              onChanged: (value) => setState(() => _query = value.trim()),
    53	              decoration: InputDecoration(
    54	                hintText: l10n.settings_searchHint,
    55	                prefixIcon: const Icon(Icons.search, size: 20),
    56	                suffixIcon: _query.isNotEmpty
    57	                    ? IconButton(
    58	                        icon: const Icon(Icons.clear, size: 18),
    59	                        onPressed: () {
    60	                          _searchController.clear();
    61	                          setState(() => _query = '');
    62	                          _focusNode.unfocus();
    63	                        },
    64	                      )
    65	                    : null,
    66	                filled: true,
    67	                fillColor: theme.colorScheme.surfaceContainerHighest
    68	                    .withValues(alpha: 0.4),
    69	                border: OutlineInputBorder(
    70	                  borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),
    71	                  borderSide: BorderSide.none,
    72	                ),
    73	                contentPadding:
    74	                    const EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 16, vertical: 10),
    75	                isDense: true,
    76	              ),
    77	              style: theme.textTheme.bodyMedium,
    78	            ),
    79	          ),
    80	          // 内容区域
    81	          Expanded(
    82	            child: isSearching
    83	                ? _buildSearchResults(theme)
    84	                : _buildCategoryList(theme, l10n),
    85	          ),
    86	        ],
    87	      ),
    88	    );
    89	  }
    90	
    91	  /// 搜索结果（自动从数据声明派生）
    92	  Widget _buildSearchResults(ThemeData theme) {
    93	    final allResults = buildSearchIndex(context);
    94	    final q = _query.toLowerCase();
    95	    final filtered = allResults
    96	        .where((r) => r.model.matchesQuery(q))
    97	        .toList();
    98	
    99	    if (filtered.isEmpty) {
   100	      return Center(
   101	        child: Column(
   102	          mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min,
   103	          children: [
   104	            Icon(
   105	              Icons.search_off_rounded,
   106	              size: 48,
   107	              color:
   108	                  theme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant.withValues(alpha: 0.4),
   109	            ),
   110	            const SizedBox(height: 12),
   111	            Text(
   112	              context.l10n.settings_searchEmpty,
   113	              style: theme.textTheme.bodyMedium?.copyWith(
   114	                color: theme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant,
   115	              ),
   116	            ),
   117	          ],
   118	        ),
   119	      );
   120	    }
   121	
   122	    return ListView.separated(
   123	      padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 16, vertical: 4),
   124	      itemCount: filtered.length,
   125	      separatorBuilder: (_, __) => const SizedBox(height: 2),
   126	      itemBuilder: (context, index) {
   127	        final result = filtered[index];
   128	        return Card(
   129	          shape: RoundedRectangleBorder(
   130	            borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),
   131	          ),
   132	          clipBehavior: Clip.antiAlias,
   133	          child: ListTile(
   134	            leading: Container(
   135	              padding: const EdgeInsets.all(6),
   136	              decoration: BoxDecoration(
   137	                color: result.categoryColor.withValues(alpha: 0.1),
   138	                borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(8),
   139	              ),
   140	              child: Icon(result.categoryIcon,
   141	                  color: result.categoryColor, size: 18),
   142	            ),
   143	            title: Text(
   144	              result.model.title,
   145	              style: theme.textTheme.bodyMedium?.copyWith(
   146	                fontWeight: FontWeight.w500,
   147	              ),
   148	            ),
   149	            subtitle: Text(
   150	              result.categoryName,
   151	              style: theme.textTheme.bodySmall?.copyWith(
   152	                color: theme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant,
   153	                fontSize: 11,
   154	              ),
   155	            ),
   156	            trailing: Icon(
   157	              Icons.chevron_right_rounded,
   158	              color: theme.colorScheme.outline.withValues(alpha: 0.4),
   159	              size: 18,
   160	            ),
   161	            dense: true,
   162	            onTap: () => Navigator.push(
   163	              context,
   164	              MaterialPageRoute(
   165	                builder: (_) =>
   166	                    result.pageBuilder(highlightId: result.model.id),
   167	              ),
   168	            ),
   169	          ),
   170	        );
   171	      },
   172	    );
   173	  }
   174	
   175	  /// 默认分类列表
   176	  Widget _buildCategoryList(ThemeData theme, AppLocalizations l10n) {
   177	    return ListView(
   178	      padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 16, vertical: 4),
   179	      children: [
   180	        Card(
   181	          shape: RoundedRectangleBorder(
   182	            borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(16),
   183	          ),
   184	          clipBehavior: Clip.antiAlias,
   185	          child: Column(
   186	            children: [
   187	              _buildOptionTile(
   188	                icon: Icons.color_lens_rounded,
   189	                iconColor: Colors.teal,
   190	                title: l10n.settings_appearance,
   191	                onTap: () => Navigator.push(context,
   192	                    MaterialPageRoute(builder: (_) => const AppearancePage())),
   193	              ),
   194	              _buildDivider(theme),
   195	              _buildOptionTile(
   196	                icon: Icons.auto_stories_rounded,
   197	                iconColor: Colors.deepOrange,
   198	                title: l10n.settings_reading,
   199	                onTap: () => Navigator.push(
   200	                    context,
   201	                    MaterialPageRoute(
   202	                        builder: (_) => const ReadingSettingsPage())),
   203	              ),
   204	              _buildDivider(theme),
   205	              _buildOptionTile(
   206	                icon: Icons.network_check_rounded,
   207	                iconColor: Colors.blueGrey,
   208	                title: l10n.settings_network,
   209	                onTap: () => Navigator.push(
   210	                    context,
   211	                    MaterialPageRoute(
   212	                        builder: (_) => const NetworkSettingsPage())),
   213	              ),
   214	              _buildDivider(theme),
   215	              _buildOptionTile(
   216	                icon: Icons.tune_rounded,
   217	                iconColor: Colors.deepPurple,
   218	                title: l10n.settings_preferences,
   219	                onTap: () => Navigator.push(
   220	                    context,
   221	                    MaterialPageRoute(
   222	                        builder: (_) => const PreferencesPage())),
   223	              ),
   224	              _buildDivider(theme),
   225	              _buildOptionTile(
   226	                icon: Icons.storage_rounded,
   227	                iconColor: Colors.brown,
   228	                title: l10n.settings_dataManagement,
   229	                onTap: () => Navigator.push(
   230	                    context,
   231	                    MaterialPageRoute(
   232	                        builder: (_) => const DataManagementPage())),
   233	              ),
   234	              // 快捷键（仅桌面端）
   235	              if (PlatformUtils.isDesktop) ...[
   236	                _buildDivider(theme),
   237	                _buildOptionTile(
   238	                  icon: Icons.keyboard_rounded,
   239	                  iconColor: Colors.cyan,
   240	                  title: l10n.settings_shortcuts,
   241	                  onTap: () => Navigator.push(
   242	                      context,
   243	                      MaterialPageRoute(
   244	                          builder: (_) => const ShortcutSettingsPage())),
   245	                ),
   246	              ],
   247	              _buildDivider(theme),
   248	              _buildOptionTile(
   249	                icon: Icons.info_rounded,
   250	                iconColor: Colors.indigo,
   251	                title: l10n.settings_about,
   252	                onTap: () => Navigator.push(context,
   253	                    MaterialPageRoute(builder: (_) => const AboutPage())),
   254	              ),
   255	            ],
   256	          ),
   257	        ),
   258	      ],
   259	    );
   260	  }
   261	
   262	  Widget _buildDivider(ThemeData theme) {
   263	    return Padding(
   264	      padding: const EdgeInsets.only(left: 60),
   265	      child: Divider(
   266	        height: 1,
   267	        thickness: 0.5,
   268	        color: theme.colorScheme.outlineVariant.withValues(alpha: 0.2),
   269	      ),
   270	    );
   271	  }
   272	
   273	  Widget _buildOptionTile({
   274	    required IconData icon,
   275	    Color? iconColor,
   276	    required String title,
   277	    required VoidCallback onTap,
   278	  }) {
   279	    final theme = Theme.of(context);
   280	    final finalIconColor = iconColor ?? theme.colorScheme.primary;
   281	
   282	    return InkWell(
   283	      onTap: onTap,
   284	      child: Padding(
   285	        padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 16, vertical: 16),
   286	        child: Row(
   287	          children: [
   288	            Container(
   289	              padding: const EdgeInsets.all(8),
   290	              decoration: BoxDecoration(
   291	                color: finalIconColor.withValues(alpha: 0.1),
   292	                borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(10),
   293	              ),
   294	              child: Icon(icon, color: finalIconColor, size: 20),
   295	            ),
   296	            const SizedBox(width: 16),
   297	            Expanded(
   298	              child: Text(
   299	                title,
   300	                style: theme.textTheme.bodyMedium?.copyWith(
   301	                  fontSize: 15,
   302	                  fontWeight: FontWeight.w500,
   303	                ),
   304	              ),
   305	            ),
   306	            Icon(
   307	              Icons.chevron_right_rounded,
   308	              color: theme.colorScheme.outline.withValues(alpha: 0.4),
   309	              size: 20,
   310	            ),
   311	          ],
   312	        ),
   313	      ),
   314	    );
   315	  }
   316	}
